'''zothawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetational|vegetational]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetational|vegetational]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zothawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zothawithi || zothawiji || zothawishi || zothawiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zothawuthu || zothawuju || zothawushu || zothawuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zothawuthu || zothawuju || zothawushu || zothawuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zothawufthuf || zothawufjuf || zothawufshuf || zothawufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zothawethe || zothaweje || zothaweshe || zothaweke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zothawotho || zothawojo || zothawosho || zothawoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zothawotho || zothawojo || zothawosho || zothawoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zothawofthof || zothawofjof || zothawofshof || zothawofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zothawïfthïf || zothawïfjïf || zothawïfshïf || zothawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zothawïfthïf || zothawïfjïf || zothawïfshïf || zothawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zothawïfthïf || zothawïfjïf || zothawïfshïf || zothawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zothawïfthïf || zothawïfjïf || zothawïfshïf || zothawïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zothawæthæ || zothawæjæ || zothawæshæ || zothawækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zothawatha || zothawaja || zothawasha || zothawaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zothawatha || zothawaja || zothawasha || zothawaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zothawafthaf || zothawafjaf || zothawafshaf || zothawafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || zothawasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || zothawshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || zothawroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || zothawmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || zothawyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozothawnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozothawnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozothawnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozothawnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || zothathawasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || zothathawshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || zothathawroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || zothathawmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || zothathawyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozothathawnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozothathawnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozothathawnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozothathawnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || zethæwasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || zethæwshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || zethæwroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || zethæwmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || zethæwyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozethæwnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozethæwnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozethæwnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozethæwnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || zothfawasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || zothfawshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || zothfawroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || zothfawmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || zothfawyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozothfawnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozothfawnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozothfawnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozothfawnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
